data.title: Bridgemarq Reports Q3 Results and Declares Dividend
data.description:
Bridgemarq Real Estate Services, Inc. ( (BREUF) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Bridgemarq Real Estate Services, Inc. presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Bridgemarq Real Estate Services Inc. is a prominent provider of services to residential real estate brokers, operating a network of over 21,000 REALTORS® across Canada under various well-known brands. In its latest financial report, Bridgemarq announced its third-quarter results, highlighting a revenue of $122.9 million and a net loss reduction compared to the previous year. The company has also declared a monthly dividend for its shareholders.

The company reported a year-to-date increase in its network by over 640 real estate professionals. Despite a slight decrease in quarterly revenue compared to last year, the company saw an increase in franchise fees due to fee adjustments and a growing number of REALTORS®. Adjusted Net Earnings for the quarter were $1.0 million, while Free Cash Flow stood at $1.5 million, both showing a decline from the previous year.

Bridgemarq’s net loss for the quarter was $1.7 million, a significant improvement from the $10.8 million loss in the same period last year. This improvement is attributed to stable valuation of Exchangeable Units. The company also experienced a decrease in cash provided by operating activities, which dropped to $1.3 million from $2.7 million the previous year.

Looking ahead, Bridgemarq remains focused on expanding its agent network and enhancing the value it provides to its clients. The company continues to navigate the unpredictable market conditions with a commitment to maintaining its competitive edge through relevant tools and resources.

data.title: Freedom Holding Corp. Reports Mixed Quarterly Earnings
data.description:
Freedom Holding Corp ( (FRHC) ) has released its Q2 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Freedom Holding Corp presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Freedom Holding Corp. is a diversified financial services company based in Nevada, operating across multiple countries, offering services in securities brokerage, banking, insurance, and various lifestyle services including telecommunications and media.

In its latest quarterly earnings report, Freedom Holding Corp. reported a mixed financial performance with a notable decrease in net income compared to the previous year, alongside a slight increase in total assets. The company continues to expand its service offerings and geographical reach, despite facing challenges in certain revenue streams.

Key financial highlights include a total revenue of $526.1 million for the quarter, a decrease from $586.1 million in the same period last year. The net income attributable to common shareholders was $38.7 million, significantly down from $114.7 million the previous year. The company saw a rise in customer liabilities and a decrease in securities repurchase agreement obligations, reflecting changes in its financial strategy.

Despite the decline in net income, Freedom Holding Corp. continues to invest in its subsidiaries and expand its market presence. The acquisition of Astel Group Ltd. by Freedom Telecom highlights the company’s ongoing efforts to strengthen its telecommunications segment.

Looking ahead, Freedom Holding Corp. remains focused on leveraging its diverse portfolio and expanding its global footprint. The management is optimistic about future growth opportunities, driven by strategic investments and a commitment to enhancing shareholder value.

data.title: Canterbury Park Holding Reports Q3 2025 Earnings
data.description:
Canterbury Park Holding ( (CPHC) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Canterbury Park Holding presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Canterbury Park Holding Corporation operates in the entertainment and gaming industry, primarily focusing on horse racing, casino operations, and real estate development in Shakopee, Minnesota. The company is known for its Canterbury Commons™ development project and its year-round casino and seasonal horse racing activities.

In its latest earnings report for the quarter ended September 30, 2025, Canterbury Park Holding Corporation reported a decline in total net revenues compared to the previous year, with casino operations, pari-mutuel wagering, and food and beverage sales as the main revenue streams. The company also highlighted its ongoing real estate development projects and efforts to enhance its gaming and racing offerings.

Key financial metrics revealed a decrease in net revenues to $18.3 million for the quarter, down from $19.3 million in the same period last year. The company reported a net income of $487,283, a significant drop from $2.0 million in the previous year. The decline was attributed to lower revenues from casino and pari-mutuel operations, partially offset by an increase in food and beverage sales. Additionally, the company faced losses from its equity investments in joint ventures related to real estate development.

Despite the challenges, Canterbury Park Holding Corporation remains focused on its strategic initiatives, including the development of Canterbury Commons™ and enhancing its gaming and racing operations. The company continues to manage its financial resources prudently, with an increase in cash and cash equivalents reported.

Looking forward, Canterbury Park Holding Corporation’s management remains optimistic about future growth opportunities, particularly through its real estate development projects and potential legislative changes that could enhance its gaming operations. The company aims to leverage its unique position in the market to drive long-term value for its shareholders.

data.title: MiNK Therapeutics Advances iNKT Platform in Q3 2025
data.description:
Mink Therapeutics, Inc. ( (INKT) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Mink Therapeutics, Inc. presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

MiNK Therapeutics, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company specializing in the development of allogeneic invariant natural killer T (iNKT) cell therapies aimed at restoring immune balance to treat cancer and immune disorders.

In its latest earnings report, MiNK Therapeutics highlighted significant advancements in its iNKT platform, showcasing durable clinical responses in refractory cancers and expanding its research into pulmonary diseases and transplantation. The company also announced strategic leadership additions to further its development goals.

Key financial metrics revealed a net loss of $2.9 million for Q3 2025, compared to $1.8 million in the same quarter of 2024, reflecting ongoing investment in its lead asset, agenT-797. The company ended the quarter with $14.3 million in cash, extending its financial runway through 2026. MiNK also launched a federally and philanthropically funded trial in collaboration with the University of Wisconsin to explore the use of agenT-797 in preventing graft-versus-host disease (GvHD).

The company continues to gain momentum with its iNKT platform, as evidenced by peer-reviewed publications validating its therapeutic potential across multiple high-need conditions. The addition of experts in pulmonary medicine and trauma to its leadership team is expected to drive pivotal development in these areas.

Looking ahead, MiNK Therapeutics is poised for multiple clinical and strategic milestones, with plans to initiate new trials and provide updates on its ongoing programs. The company remains focused on advancing its iNKT therapies to address unmet needs in oncology, transplantation, and severe inflammation.

data.title: LM Funding America Reports Strong Q3 2025 Results
data.description:
Lm Funding America ( (LMFA) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Lm Funding America presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

LM Funding America, Inc. is a Bitcoin treasury and mining company based in Tampa, Florida, that also operates a technology-enabled specialty finance business providing funding to nonprofit community associations primarily in Florida.

In its third-quarter 2025 financial results, LM Funding America reported a total revenue of $2.2 million, marking a 13% sequential increase and a 73.5% year-over-year rise. The company highlighted its acquisition of an 11 MW Bitcoin mining facility in Mississippi and a successful $21.3 million treasury raise aimed at enhancing its Bitcoin holdings.

Key financial metrics for the quarter included a mining margin improvement to 49% from 41% in the previous quarter, driven by higher Bitcoin prices and increased efficiency. The company mined 17.6 Bitcoins during the quarter, and its net loss narrowed to $3.7 million from $4.3 million in the same period last year. Additionally, LM Funding executed a share repurchase and authorized a buyback program, reflecting its confidence in its intrinsic value.

Operationally, LM Funding expanded its infrastructure to 26 megawatts across two sites, with a notable 27.8% increase in Bitcoin production in October 2025. The company also progressed on its 2 MW immersion expansion in Oklahoma, expected to energize in December 2025, enhancing efficiency and uptime.

Looking forward, LM Funding America remains focused on improving production, efficiency, and Bitcoin per share, leveraging its strengthened Bitcoin treasury and expanded infrastructure to enhance shareholder value.

JBS S.A. is a global leader in the food industry, primarily operating in the meat processing sector with a diverse multiprotein platform. In its third quarter of 2025, JBS reported record net sales of $22.6 billion, marking a 13% increase from the previous year, despite challenges in profitability with a 15% decline in adjusted EBITDA. data.title: KGHM Polska Miedź S.A. Reports Q3 2025 Earnings
data.description:
KGHM Polska Miedz SA ( (KGHPF) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information KGHM Polska Miedz SA presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

KGHM Polska Miedź S.A., a prominent player in the mining sector, specializes in the extraction and production of copper, precious, and non-ferrous metals, with operations spanning across Poland, the USA, Canada, and Chile. The company is listed on the Warsaw Stock Exchange and is known for its comprehensive mining and metallurgical activities, including the production of goods from copper and precious metals, and providing various services related to mining and metallurgy.

In its latest earnings report for the third quarter of 2025, KGHM Polska Miedź S.A. reported consolidated revenues of PLN 25,871 million, slightly down from the previous year’s PLN 26,139 million. The company achieved a profit before income tax of PLN 2,239 million, a decrease from PLN 2,388 million in the same period last year. The profit for the period attributable to shareholders was PLN 1,012 million, reflecting a decline from PLN 1,313 million in 2024.

Key financial metrics indicate a challenging period for KGHM, with earnings per share dropping to PLN 5.06 from PLN 6.57 in the previous year. The company experienced a decrease in net cash generated from operating activities, which stood at PLN 2,682 million, compared to PLN 3,433 million in the previous year. Despite these challenges, the company maintained a stable asset base, with total assets increasing to PLN 55,109 million from PLN 53,892 million at the end of 2024.

Looking forward, KGHM Polska Miedź S.A. remains focused on advancing its strategic goals, including efficiency improvements, exploration projects, and increasing energy independence. The management is optimistic about the company’s ability to navigate the current economic environment, leveraging its robust asset base and strategic initiatives to drive future growth and shareholder value.

data.description:

SuperCom Ltd. is a global provider of secured solutions for the e-Government, IoT, and Cybersecurity sectors, offering advanced safety, identification, and security solutions to governments and organizations worldwide.

In its latest earnings report, SuperCom Ltd. announced significant financial achievements for the first nine months of 2025, including a record net income of $6 million and a non-GAAP EPS of $2.17. The company also highlighted a strong EBITDA margin of 35.4% and a notable increase in gross profit and operating income compared to the previous year.

Key financial metrics from the report include a slight decrease in revenue to $20.4 million, while gross profit increased to $12.5 million, leading to an expanded gross margin of 61.0%. Operating income nearly tripled to $3.0 million, and net income more than doubled to $6.0 million. Additionally, SuperCom’s non-GAAP net income rose to $9.3 million, with an impressive non-GAAP net margin of 45.7%. The company’s strategic expansion is evident with over 30 new electronic monitoring contracts in the U.S. and a significant $7 million contract in Germany.

SuperCom’s strategic advancements are further underscored by its successful displacement of incumbent providers in various regions, including new partnerships and contracts in Alabama, Utah, and Germany. These achievements reflect the growing demand for SuperCom’s technology and its ability to expand rapidly in both U.S. and international markets.

Looking ahead, SuperCom’s management remains optimistic about continued growth, driven by its international expansion strategy and the increasing adoption of its solutions across core markets. The company aims to scale operations, expand recurring revenue, and strengthen its industry leadership, signaling a promising outlook for stakeholders.

VolitionRx Limited is a multi-national epigenetics company dedicated to advancing the science of epigenetics through the development and commercialization of simple, cost-effective blood tests for early disease detection and monitoring, focusing on critical areas such as cancer and sepsis.

In its third quarter of 2025, VolitionRx Limited reported significant progress in commercializing its Nu.Q platform, highlighted by new agreements with major companies Werfen and Hologic. These partnerships are expected to enhance the company’s presence in the human diagnostics market.

The company reported a 32% increase in revenue for the third quarter, alongside a reduction in operating expenses by 10% year-on-year. Additionally, the net loss decreased by 8% for the quarter, with a notable reduction in net cash used in operating activities by 33% compared to the previous year. VolitionRx also secured approximately $6.1 million from a public offering post-quarter.

VolitionRx’s strategic focus remains on securing further licensing agreements in the human diagnostics space, leveraging its success in the veterinary market. The company anticipates continued growth and innovation in its Nu.Q technology, aiming to contribute significantly to oncology and NETosis detection and monitoring.

Looking ahead, VolitionRx is optimistic about its future prospects, driven by ongoing discussions with leading diagnostic companies and the potential for diverse deal structures that could provide upfront and milestone payments, as well as recurring revenue streams.

data.title: Tivic Health Systems Advances Biologics Pipeline
data.description:
Tivic Health Systems, Inc. ( (TIVC) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Tivic Health Systems, Inc. presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Tivic Health Systems, Inc. is a diversified immunotherapeutics company focused on leveraging biopharmaceutical and bioelectronic systems to address unmet medical needs, particularly in the field of immunotherapy. The company is advancing its biologics pipeline, including its lead drug candidate Entolimod for acute radiation syndrome.

In the third quarter of 2025, Tivic Health Systems reported financial results highlighting strategic transformations and advancements in its biologics pipeline. The company is progressing towards commercial readiness, with significant developments in manufacturing processes and clinical trials.

Key financial metrics for the quarter include a revenue of $146,000, a slight increase from the previous year, and a net loss of $2.6 million compared to $1.4 million in the third quarter of 2024. Tivic has successfully transferred two INDs from Statera Biopharma, enabling clinical trials for Entolimod in treating neutropenia and cancer-related conditions. Additionally, the company has completed the cell line verification necessary for cGMP manufacturing.

Tivic has also made strategic decisions to wind down its consumer health tech business, focusing resources on its clinical pipeline. This includes discontinuing ClearUP sales and launching a new corporate website to reflect its transformed mission. The company closed multiple financing tranches, raising $3.8 million in net proceeds during the quarter.

Looking ahead, Tivic Health Systems remains committed to advancing its clinical pipeline and exploring potential pathways for deploying Entolimod as a military countermeasure. With sufficient funding and no debt, the company is well-positioned to make meaningful progress in its manufacturing validation and strategic initiatives.

data.title: Cineverse Corp. Reports Q2 FY 2026 Earnings
data.description:
Cineverse Corp. ( (CNVS) ) has released its Q2 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Cineverse Corp. presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Cineverse Corp. is a next-generation entertainment studio that specializes in content creation and distribution, leveraging technology to deliver diverse entertainment experiences across various platforms. In its latest earnings report for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026, Cineverse Corp. announced a total revenue of $12.4 million, reflecting a 3% decline year-over-year due to timing differences in revenue recognition from content licensing agreements. Despite the revenue dip, the company reported a 7% improvement in direct operating margin, reaching 58%, and highlighted strong performance in ancillary markets for its recent release, ‘The Toxic Avenger Unrated.’

The company’s financial performance was marked by a significant increase in SG&A expenses, up by 79% to $11.4 million, primarily driven by marketing costs for ‘The Toxic Avenger Unrated’ and investments in expanding its theatrical slate and technology capabilities. The net loss attributable to common stockholders widened to $5.7 million compared to $1.4 million in the prior-year quarter, while adjusted EBITDA turned negative at $3.7 million from a positive $0.5 million last year. Despite these challenges, Cineverse continues to expand its content offerings and strategic partnerships, including a new venture for microseries and a re-release of ‘Pan’s Labyrinth.’

Cineverse’s operational developments include the launch of a new studio platform, MicroCo, and the expansion of its technology leadership team. The company also announced several strategic partnerships and acquisitions, such as the US rights for ‘Air Bud Returns’ and a partnership with Liquid Death for ‘The Toxic Avenger Unrated.’ These initiatives are part of Cineverse’s strategy to leverage its extensive content library and technology platforms to drive future growth.

Looking ahead, Cineverse remains focused on enhancing its technology and content distribution capabilities, with plans to release the 20th anniversary edition of ‘Pan’s Labyrinth’ and further develop its Matchpoint™ technology partnerships. The company aims to maintain its growth trajectory by balancing strategic investments with financial discipline, positioning itself as a leader in both technology and entertainment sectors.

data.title: BIO-key International Reports Q3 2025 Financial Results
data.description:
Bio-Key International ( (BKYI) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Bio-Key International presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

BIO-key International, Inc. is a leading provider of Identity and Access Management (IAM) and biometric authentication technologies, offering solutions that secure access for over forty million users globally. The company operates primarily in the cybersecurity sector, focusing on biometric-centric, multi-factor identity solutions.

In its latest earnings report for the third quarter of 2025, BIO-key International reported a decline in total revenues to $1.55 million, down from $2.14 million in the same period last year. The decrease was attributed to the absence of large orders from key customers that had boosted the previous year’s results. Despite this, the company highlighted strategic advancements, including the launch of its EcoID III fingerprint scanner and a significant new deployment in the Middle East defense sector.

Key financial metrics revealed a 7.8% reduction in operating expenses, driven by cost-cutting measures, although the company still reported a net loss of $964,849 for the quarter. The gross margin remained strong at 77%, and the company raised $3.1 million in gross proceeds from a warrant exercise agreement, which is expected to support future growth initiatives.

BIO-key’s strategic focus includes expanding its presence in Europe and the Middle East, leveraging its CyberDefense Initiative to capitalize on increased defense spending in these regions. The company is also enhancing its product offerings with advanced biometric solutions, aiming to capture opportunities in defense, finance, government, and higher education sectors.

Looking ahead, BIO-key anticipates a strong finish to 2025 with projected full-year revenues between $6.5 million and $7 million. The management remains optimistic about future growth, driven by strategic partnerships and a focus on cost reduction to achieve positive cash flow and profitability.

data.title: Alithya Group Reports Strong Revenue Growth Amid Challenges
data.description:
Alithya Group, Inc. Class A ( (ALYAF) ) has released its Q2 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Alithya Group, Inc. Class A presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Alithya Group, Inc. Class A is a strategic consulting and digital transformation services company that leverages AI and the latest technologies to solve business challenges and unlock new opportunities for its clients. The company operates in the technology sector and is known for its specialized global delivery network and AI-based IP solutions.

In its latest earnings report for the second quarter of fiscal 2026, Alithya Group reported significant growth in revenues and gross margins. The company achieved an 11.5% increase in revenues, reaching $124.3 million, and a 25.5% increase in gross margin, which rose to $42.8 million. Despite these positive results, the company reported a net loss of $31.0 million due to a $38.0 million impairment charge.

Key financial metrics highlighted in the report include an 80% increase in Adjusted Net Earnings to $9.5 million and a 37.5% rise in Adjusted EBITDA to $12.8 million. The company’s U.S. revenues saw a substantial increase of 34.8%, driven by organic growth and recent acquisitions. However, Canadian revenues declined due to reduced government contracts and project maturities.

Looking forward, Alithya’s management remains optimistic about the company’s growth prospects. They emphasize the company’s expanded capabilities through acquisitions and integration of new technologies, positioning Alithya to undertake larger, high-value projects essential to AI transformation. The company continues to focus on value creation for clients and steady growth in the industry.

data.title: Nidec Corporation Reports Q1 2025 Financial Results
data.description:
Nidec Corporation Sponsored ADR ( (NJDCY) ) has released its Q2 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Nidec Corporation Sponsored ADR presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Nidec Corporation, a leading manufacturer in the electric motor industry, has reported its financial results for the three months ending June 30, 2025. The company, known for its precision motors and automotive components, is navigating a challenging period marked by strategic restructuring and financial adjustments.

The latest earnings report from Nidec Corporation reveals a decline in net sales to ¥638,026 million, a 1.6% decrease compared to the same period last year. The company also reported an operating loss of ¥26,407 million, a significant drop from the previous year’s profit. This downturn is attributed to provisions for contract losses, impairment of non-financial assets, and currency exchange fluctuations.

Despite the overall financial challenges, some product categories showed resilience. The small precision motors segment saw a slight increase in net sales and a notable rise in operating profit. However, the automotive products category faced substantial losses due to various financial provisions and impairments. The company’s financial position also reflected increased liabilities and a decrease in equity attributable to owners.

Looking ahead, Nidec Corporation is implementing a medium-term management plan, ‘Conversion 2027,’ aimed at transforming its cost structure and enhancing profitability. The company’s management is focused on strategic initiatives to support future growth and global expansion, despite ongoing investigations into accounting practices that could impact financial statements.

As Nidec navigates these challenges, investors and stakeholders will be closely monitoring the company’s strategic execution and the outcomes of the ongoing investigations, which could influence future financial performance and stock market positioning.

data.title: Nidec Corporation Faces Financial Challenges Amid Strategic Shift
data.description:
Nidec Corporation ( (NNDNF) ) has released its Q2 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Nidec Corporation presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Nidec Corporation, a leading Japanese manufacturer specializing in electric motors and related components, operates primarily in the electronics and automotive sectors. The company is known for its innovative solutions and global presence.

In its latest earnings report for the quarter ending June 30, 2025, Nidec Corporation reported a challenging financial performance, marked by a decline in net sales and significant losses. The company is currently undergoing strategic transformations under its ‘Conversion 2027’ plan, aimed at restructuring its business for future growth.

Key financial metrics revealed a 1.6% decrease in net sales to ¥638,026 million and a substantial operating loss of ¥26,407 million, compared to a profit in the previous year. The automotive sector faced the largest setbacks, contributing to the overall losses due to provisions for contract losses and impairment of non-financial assets. Despite these challenges, Nidec’s small precision motors and appliance sectors showed resilience with increased operating profits.

The company’s financial position saw a slight increase in total assets, but total liabilities also rose, impacting equity negatively. Cash flow from operations decreased, reflecting the operational challenges Nidec is facing. The company is also dealing with ongoing investigations into accounting practices, which have led to its designation as a ‘Security on Special Alert’ by the Tokyo Stock Exchange.

Looking ahead, Nidec’s management remains focused on its strategic ‘Conversion 2027’ plan, aiming to enhance profitability and global operations. However, the uncertainty surrounding the ongoing investigations and financial restructuring efforts may pose challenges in the near term.

data.title: CyberAgent’s FY2025 Results: Strong Growth Across Segments
data.description:
Cyberagent ( (CYAGF) ) has released its Q4 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Cyberagent presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

CyberAgent, Inc., a prominent player in the digital advertising and gaming sectors, has reported its consolidated financial results for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2025, showcasing significant growth across its business segments. The company, known for its innovative ‘ABEMA’ platform and strong presence in the gaming industry, continues to expand its influence in the media and internet advertisement markets.

In the latest fiscal year, CyberAgent achieved a 9.1% increase in net sales, reaching ¥874,030 million, marking the 28th consecutive period of revenue growth. Operating income surged by 78.9% to ¥71,702 million, while net income attributable to owners of the parent nearly doubled, rising 98.2% to ¥31,667 million. These impressive results were driven by the profitability of the Media & IP business, a robust performance in the gaming sector, and sustained growth in internet advertising.

The Media & IP business, which includes the ‘ABEMA’ platform, saw a 15.7% increase in net sales, returning to profitability for the first time in a decade. The Game Business also excelled, with a 10.6% rise in net sales and a remarkable 96.5% increase in operating income, thanks to successful new game releases and international expansion. However, the Internet Advertisement Business faced challenges, with a slight decline in operating income due to investments in AI and the loss of major clients.

Looking ahead, CyberAgent anticipates continued growth in its core segments, projecting consolidated sales of ¥880 billion for the next fiscal year. Despite the inherent volatility in the gaming sector, the company expects to maintain strong profitability, with operating and ordinary income forecasted to be between ¥50 billion and ¥60 billion. CyberAgent remains committed to enhancing shareholder value through consistent dividend payments and strategic business growth.

data.title: Daikin Industries Reports Resilient Earnings Amid Sales Dip
data.description:
Daikin Industries,Ltd. ( (DKILF) ) has released its Q2 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Daikin Industries,Ltd. presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Daikin Industries, Ltd. is a leading global manufacturer specializing in air conditioning, refrigeration, and chemical products, known for its innovative solutions in the HVAC industry.

In its latest earnings report for the six months ending September 30, 2025, Daikin Industries reported a slight decrease in net sales by 0.6% to ¥2,478,798 million compared to the same period last year. However, the company maintained its operating profit at ¥246,602 million, showcasing resilience in its operational efficiency.

Key financial highlights include a notable increase in ordinary profit by 7.9% to ¥241,887 million and a rise in profit attributable to owners of the parent by 6.1% to ¥160,933 million. The company’s comprehensive income saw a significant boost of 165.9% year-over-year, reaching ¥228,149 million, indicating strong overall financial health. Additionally, Daikin’s equity ratio improved to 55.5%, reflecting a solid financial position.

Looking ahead, Daikin Industries forecasts a 1.8% increase in net sales for the full fiscal year ending March 31, 2026, with a projected operating profit growth of 8.3%. The company remains optimistic about its future performance, supported by strategic expansions and a robust financial foundation.

data.title: Clearside Biomedical Inc. Explores Strategic Alternatives
data.description:
Clearside Biomedical Inc ( (CLSD) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Clearside Biomedical Inc presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Clearside Biomedical Inc., a biopharmaceutical company, is focused on delivering therapies to the back of the eye through its proprietary suprachoroidal space (SCS) platform. The company is based in Alpharetta, Georgia, and is engaged in developing product and technology rights, raising capital, and conducting research and development activities.

In its latest earnings report for the quarter ended September 30, 2025, Clearside Biomedical Inc. reported a significant decrease in cash and cash equivalents, from $20.02 million at the end of 2024 to $6.8 million. The company also announced a strategic evaluation process to explore various alternatives to advance its SCS platform and drug development pipeline, which includes potential sales, licenses, or partnerships.

Key financial highlights from the report include a net loss of $5.97 million for the third quarter of 2025, compared to a net loss of $7.69 million in the same period of 2024. The company’s revenue for the nine months ended September 30, 2025, was $3.02 million, a significant increase from $1.36 million in the same period of 2024. However, the company continues to face challenges with recurring losses and negative cash flows from operations.

The company has implemented a reverse stock split and increased its authorized shares to manage its capital structure. Despite the financial challenges, Clearside Biomedical is actively seeking strategic alternatives to maximize shareholder value and continue its operations.

Looking ahead, Clearside Biomedical’s management is focused on exploring strategic alternatives to secure additional financing and advance its SCS platform. The company remains committed to its research and development efforts, although these have been paused temporarily as part of its strategic evaluation process.

data.title: WildBrain Ltd. Reports Strong Q1 2026 Growth
data.description:
Wildbrain Ltd ( (WLDBF) ) has released its Q1 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Wildbrain Ltd presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

WildBrain Ltd., a leader in kids’ and family entertainment, specializes in 360° franchise management, including content creation, audience engagement, and global licensing, with a portfolio featuring iconic brands like Peanuts and Teletubbies.

In its first quarter of fiscal year 2026, WildBrain Ltd. reported significant growth in its Global Licensing sector, driven by popular franchises such as Peanuts and Strawberry Shortcake. The company also announced a strategic shift by ceasing its television operations to focus on higher-margin opportunities.

Key financial highlights for Q1 2026 include a 13% increase in total revenue to $125.5 million and a 37% rise in adjusted EBITDA to $20.9 million. Despite these gains, the company reported a net loss of $32.6 million, attributed to strategic restructuring and market dynamics. The Global Licensing segment saw a robust 29% revenue increase, while content creation and audience engagement faced a slight decline.

The company’s strategic decisions, including the renewal of its partnership with Apple TV for Peanuts and the cessation of its television business, reflect a focus on long-term profitability and brand expansion. These moves are expected to streamline operations and enhance financial performance.

Looking ahead, WildBrain remains optimistic about its fiscal year 2026, anticipating revenue growth of 15% to 20% excluding television operations. The company is poised to leverage its strong brand portfolio and strategic partnerships to drive future growth and profitability.

data.title: Cemig Reports Decline in Q3 Profits Amid Market Challenges
data.description:
Companhia Energetica Minas Gerais ( (CIG) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Companhia Energetica Minas Gerais presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Companhia Energetica Minas Gerais (Cemig) is a Brazilian energy company engaged in the generation, transmission, and distribution of electricity, as well as the distribution of natural gas, with a focus on renewable energy sources.

In its latest earnings report for the third quarter of 2025, Cemig reported a significant decrease in net profit compared to the previous year, with a net profit of R$ 796.7 million, down from R$ 3,280.2 million in the third quarter of 2024. The company highlighted operational efficiencies and strategic investments despite challenging market conditions.

Key financial metrics revealed a consolidated EBITDA of R$ 1.50 billion, a decrease from R$ 4.958 billion in the same period last year, primarily due to increased costs in energy trading and distribution. The company also reported a 4.4% year-on-year decrease in total energy distribution, influenced by a shift of clients to distributed generation and the free market. Despite these challenges, Cemig maintained a strong liquidity position, with a low leverage ratio of 1.76x net debt to adjusted EBITDA.

Cemig’s strategic focus on operational efficiency was evident in its ability to keep PMSO expenses below inflation and enhance its energy trading capabilities, becoming the first energy trader to reach 10,000 consumer units. The company also invested R$ 4.7 billion in capital expenditures over the first nine months of 2025, marking a 17% increase from the previous year.

Looking ahead, Cemig’s management remains cautiously optimistic, focusing on maintaining operational resilience and exploring growth opportunities in the renewable energy sector, while navigating the evolving market dynamics and regulatory landscape.

data.title: Credicorp Reports Strong Q3 2025 Financial Performance
data.description:
Credicorp ( (BAP) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Credicorp presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Credicorp Ltd., a leading financial services holding company in Peru with operations in Chile, Colombia, Bolivia, and Panama, has reported its financial results for the third quarter of 2025. The company operates primarily in the banking and insurance sectors and is known for its comprehensive financial ecosystem and innovative digital solutions.

In the third quarter of 2025, Credicorp demonstrated strong financial performance with a 14.1% year-over-year increase in net income attributable to the company, reaching S/1,738.7 million. The company’s return on equity (ROE) stood at 19.6%, supported by robust contributions from its universal banking, insurance, and microfinance segments, as well as continued growth in fee-based and transactional income.

Key financial highlights include a 4.4% year-over-year increase in total loans and a 5.9% rise in total deposits. The net interest income grew by 2.7% year-over-year, driven by a strengthened funding mix and a higher-yielding loan portfolio. The non-performing loan (NPL) ratio improved to 4.8%, and provisions for credit losses decreased by 30.5% year-over-year, reflecting better payment performance and an improved economic environment. Additionally, the insurance underwriting results rose by 33.1% year-over-year, highlighting strong performance in the life insurance business.

Looking ahead, Credicorp remains focused on sustainable growth and long-term value creation for its shareholders. The company aims to achieve a medium-term ROE of 19.5% and an efficiency ratio close to 42%, driven by accelerated loan growth, increased net interest margin, and disciplined execution of its strategic priorities. Credicorp continues to expand its digital and data-driven capabilities, positioning itself as a leader in financial inclusion and innovation in Latin America.

data.title: Swiss Re Reports Strong Nine-Month Financial Performance
data.description:
Swiss Re AG ( (SSREY) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Swiss Re AG presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Swiss Re Group, headquartered in Zurich, Switzerland, is a leading global provider of reinsurance, insurance, and other insurance-based risk transfer solutions, aiming to enhance societal resilience against various risks, including natural catastrophes and climate change.

In the third quarter of 2025, Swiss Re reported a net income of USD 1.4 billion, contributing to a total net income of USD 4.0 billion for the first nine months of the year. The company’s strong financial performance was driven by robust underwriting results in its Property & Casualty (P&C) businesses and solid investment returns.

Key financial highlights include a net income of USD 2.3 billion from P&C Reinsurance, with a combined ratio of 77.6%, and USD 693 million from Corporate Solutions, with a combined ratio of 87.1%. The Life & Health Reinsurance segment reported a net income of USD 1.1 billion. The Group’s return on equity stood at 22.5%, and the return on investments was 4.1%. Swiss Re’s capital position remains strong, with a Swiss Solvency Test ratio of 268% as of October 2025.

Despite a decrease in insurance revenue compared to the previous year, Swiss Re maintained healthy margins on new business across its segments. The Group’s strategic focus on disciplined underwriting and investment performance contributed significantly to its financial results.

Looking ahead, Swiss Re’s management remains optimistic about achieving its net income target of over USD 4.4 billion for the full year, driven by continued strong performance in its P&C businesses and strategic initiatives to enhance resilience in its Life & Health Reinsurance segment.

data.description:

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions

Frontera Energy Corporation is a Canadian company engaged in the exploration, development, production, transportation, storage, and sale of oil and natural gas in South America, with a diverse portfolio of assets in Colombia, Ecuador, and Guyana. In its third-quarter 2025 earnings report, Frontera Energy Corp announced a net income of $25.4 million, driven by $15 million in insurance recoveries related to the Sabanero block. The company generated $86.6 million in operating EBITDA and $30.4 million in adjusted infrastructure EBITDA, highlighting strong performance from its ODL pipeline operations. Frontera also reported a 5% reduction in production costs and a 1% decrease in transportation costs, reflecting operational improvements. The company declared a quarterly dividend of C$0.0625 per share, payable in January 2026, and announced its qualification for the OTCQX Best Market, enhancing its visibility and trading liquidity in the U.S. market. Looking ahead, Frontera Energy remains focused on maintaining operational flexibility and cost efficiencies, with plans to accelerate the Puerto Bahia LPG project, expected to be operational in the first half of 2026. The company continues to engage in discussions with the Government of Guyana regarding its exploration business and aims to drive long-term value creation through strategic initiatives.

data.title: CEO’s Bold Move: Major Stock Purchase Signals Confidence in Energy Vault Holdings
data.description:
New insider activity at Energy Vault Holdings ( (NRGV) ) has taken place on November 14, 2025.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

CEO Robert Piconi has made a significant investment in Energy Vault Holdings by purchasing 10,000 shares of the company’s stock, valued at $29,900. This move reflects a strong vote of confidence in the company’s future prospects.

Recent Updates on NRGV stock

Energy Vault Holdings, Inc. recently reported significant developments in its Q3 earnings call, highlighting substantial revenue growth and strategic advancements. The company achieved a 27-fold increase in revenue to $33.3 million, primarily driven by successful project execution in Australia and the launch of its Asset Vault platform. Despite macroeconomic challenges, including tariff volatility and market shutdowns, Energy Vault maintained strong financial results with a gross margin of 27%. The company secured a $300 million preferred equity investment from Orion Infrastructure, enhancing its cash position and financial stability. Energy Vault’s sustainability leadership was underscored by its top ranking in the energy storage segment. Goldman Sachs adjusted its price target for Energy Vault, citing the company’s alignment with revenue and EBITDA expectations, successful cash balance guidance, and anticipated positive cash generation in Q4 through investment tax credits monetization.

Spark’s Take on NRGV Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NRGV is a Neutral.

Energy Vault Holdings’ overall stock score is driven by strong earnings call performance and positive technical indicators, despite significant financial performance challenges and poor valuation metrics. The company’s strategic advancements and sustainability leadership are notable strengths, but ongoing profitability and cash flow issues remain key risks.

To see Spark’s full report on NRGV stock, click here.

Average Trading Volume: 3,069,867

data.title: Zomedica’s Sales VP Makes Bold Stock Purchase!
data.description:
New insider activity at Zomedica ( (ZOMDF) ) has taken place on November 14, 2025.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Klass Russell Kevin, the Senior Vice President of Sales at Zomedica, has made a significant investment by purchasing 150,000 shares of Zomedica stock. This transaction is valued at $13,500, reflecting a strong vote of confidence in the company’s future prospects.

Recent Updates on ZOMDF stock

Zomedica has reported a 16% increase in revenue for Q3 2025, reaching $8.1 million, driven by strong demand for its therapeutic devices and diagnostic products, as well as the introduction of a new Development Services revenue stream. The company saw a 51% growth in its Diagnostics segment and expanded its international presence through strategic partnerships. Despite these positive developments, Zomedica faces challenges with profitability, as indicated by a net loss of $6.1 million and concerns over delisting risks. Analysts have mixed views on the stock, with some highlighting the company’s revenue growth and strategic initiatives, while others point to weak momentum and valuation issues due to a negative P/E ratio. Zomedica remains focused on product expansion and international growth, with plans to enhance its TRUFORMA platform and launch the TRUVIEW AI platform.

Spark’s Take on ZOMDF Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ZOMDF is a Neutral.

Zomedica’s stock score reflects mixed financial performance with revenue growth but persistent profitability challenges. The technical analysis shows weak momentum, and the valuation is impacted by a negative P/E ratio. Despite strong earnings call highlights, increased net loss and delisting risks present concerns.

data.title: Insider Action: SmartStop Self Storage REIT, Inc. Stock Sale Unveiled!
data.description:
New insider activity at SmartStop Self Storage REIT, Inc. ( (SMA) ) has taken place on November 14, 2025.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Nicholas Look, who serves as the General Counsel and Secretary, recently executed a sale of 458 shares of SmartStop Self Storage REIT, Inc. stock. This transaction was valued at $15,045.

Recent Updates on SMA stock

In the last 24 hours, SmartStop Self Storage REIT, Inc. has seen significant developments following its Q3 earnings call. The company reported sector-leading same-store revenue growth and maintained a strong occupancy rate, despite challenges such as an industrial tenant default and market pressures in Toronto. SmartStop’s strategic moves, including a successful CAD 200 million Maple Bond offering and the acquisition of Argus Professional Storage Management, have bolstered its market position. The company’s inclusion in the MSCI U.S. REIT Index further enhances its visibility. However, the FFO as adjusted per share fell slightly below expectations due to unexpected costs. Analysts have adjusted their price targets, with Wells Fargo raising its target due to anticipated growth in FFO/share in 2026, while JPMorgan downgraded the stock to Neutral, reflecting concerns over market conditions and profitability challenges.

Spark’s Take on SMA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SMA is a Neutral.

SmartStop Self Storage REIT, Inc. faces profitability challenges and bearish technical indicators, impacting its overall score. However, strong cash flow and strategic initiatives from the earnings call provide a positive outlook for future growth.

data.title: Investor Tucker Greene Makes a Bold Move with Goldman Sachs BDC Stock Purchase!
data.description:
New insider activity at Goldman Sachs BDC ( (GSBD) ) has taken place on November 14, 2025.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Tucker Greene has made a significant investment by purchasing 10,500 shares of Goldman Sachs BDC stock, with the transaction valued at $103,530.

Recent Updates on GSBD stock

In the last 24 hours, Goldman Sachs BDC (GSBD) has seen a price target adjustment from Wells Fargo, lowering it from $10 to $9, with an Underweight rating maintained. This change is attributed to challenges such as the impact of SOFR and new deployment spreads, which are seen as incremental headwinds. Despite the positive sentiment from its Q3 earnings call, which highlighted strong M&A activity and strategic investments, the company faces challenges including a decrease in net asset value and tight credit spreads. The earnings report revealed a net investment income of $0.40 per share and a slight decrease in net asset value per share to $12.75. The company declared a fourth-quarter base dividend of $0.32 per share and a third-quarter supplemental dividend of $0.04 per share, reflecting strategic dividend management amidst a challenging investment environment. Analysts remain cautious, with technical indicators suggesting downward pressure, although there is potential for recovery.

Spark’s Take on GSBD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GSBD is a Outperform.

Goldman Sachs BDC’s strengths lie in its solid financial foundation and attractive dividend yield, appealing to long-term investors. The earnings call revealed strategic improvements but highlighted some underlying challenges. Technical indicators suggest current downward pressure, yet potential for recovery. The overall outlook is cautiously optimistic, focusing on addressing cash flow and revenue growth concerns.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

In recent transactions involving loanDepot stock, Director Dawn Lepore sold 30,624 shares, amounting to a total of $88,503. Meanwhile, Executive Chair, CEO & President Anthony Li Hsieh executed a significantly larger sale, offloading 700,000 shares for a total of $2,009,000.

Recent Updates on LDI stock

loanDepot, Inc. has recently reported its Q3 2025 financial results, showing a 14% increase in revenue to $323 million and a significant reduction in net loss by 65% compared to the previous quarter. The positive momentum is attributed to higher pull-through volume, improved margins, and increased servicing income. The company also introduced new leadership and strategic initiatives, including AI capabilities, to enhance performance and reduce costs. Despite these advancements, loanDepot faces challenges such as a decrease in loan origination volume and rising expenses. Analysts have raised the price target for loanDepot, reflecting optimism in its strategic improvements and financial advancements, yet caution remains due to ongoing financial hurdles and expected expense increases.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LDI is a Neutral.
